checks.name: llm_base_url
checks.message: base_url looks syntactically valid but has no explicit API path: https://api.whatai.cc. Many OpenAI-compatible relays expect a `/v1` suffix.

checks.name: llm_ping
checks.message: RuntimeError: AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'model_dump'. The configured OpenAI-compatible `base_url` appears to point at a website root instead of a chat-completions API endpoint: https://api.whatai.cc. If you are using a relay or proxy, configure the full API root such as `https://host/v1`; if you want the official provider endpoint, leave `base_url` empty or null in YAML.
